scripts.dev: npm run api:ensure && npm run dev --workspace=customer-app
scripts.dev:admin: npm run api:ensure && npm run dev --workspace=admin-app
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:marketing"
scripts.seed:db: npm run db:migrate --workspace=server && npm run seed --workspace=server
